Case# CWErr.cwUnspecifiedFailureErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwUnspecifiedFailureErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwunspecifiedfailureerr#Discussion)

Access point did not specify a reason for authentication/association failure.
